history.note: Prior-session fleet — productization, full local deployment, and the parity + knowledge capstones (all shipped). Retired; not part of the current redesign work.

progress.basis: Overall % is shipped-plus-in-flight work over the WHOLE project (99/136 tasks done=73%, plus half-credit for in-flight tasks) — archiving old 100%-done tasks off the active list never shrinks this number. Per-track %, remaining hours/sessions below are scoped to the ACTIVE (decluttered) task list only — done=100%, in-progress=50%, pending=0% — so they reflect what's actually still in flight. All ESTIMATES; the measured signal is commit velocity (below).
